THE ICEBREAKER GAME FOR TWO

THE ICEBREAKER GAME FOR TWO

Two people. One deck.
Zero awkward silences.

PlayDate turns any date into a game — pick a category, choose your level, and let the cards do the flirting. Fun questions, spontaneous actions, undeniable chemistry.
